title: Is Death just the added scenes of Directors Cut 21 26
display_title: Is Death just the added scenes of Directors Cut 21 26
wikitext: []: Is Death just the added scenes of Director's Cut 21-26?             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 12:38 pm Recently I ordered Death and Rebirth as well as Resurrection and Genesis Reborn. But after a quick scan through some of the threads on here it sounds like Resurrection and Genesis Reborn are just the aired episodes with the scenes from Death added in. Is this correct? Does one contain things that the other does not?
